raw_text:
<think>
Let me analyze this carefully.

The action is: Should change CHG-811 execute at the requested UTC time?

Source records:
1. REQ-CHG-811: wants to execute at 22:20Z on 2026-07-03
2. WIN-CHG-811: authorizes from 13:00 to 14:00 PT on 2026-07-03
3. TZ-SITE-R: site uses PT, and PT = UTC-7 on 2026-07-03
4. APP-CHG-811: binds CHG-811, site SITE-R, and approval window WIN-CHG-811
5. POL-CHG-TZ: requires execution time to fall inside the approved local site window after timezone conversion

Let me convert:
- Approval window in PT: 13:00 to 14:00 PT
- PT = UTC-7 on 2026-07-03
- So 13:00 PT = 20:00 UTC
- So 14:00 PT = 21:00 UTC

The requested time is 22:20Z.

The approved window (converted to UTC) is 20:00 to 21:00 UTC.

22:20 UTC is NOT within 20:00-21:00 UTC.

So the requested execution time (22:20Z) falls OUTSIDE the approved window (20:00-21:00Z).

Therefore: ESCALATE
The action cannot proceed because the requested UTC time (22:20Z) is outside the approved window when converted from the local PT time (13:00-14:00 PT = 20:00-21:00 UTC).

Binding class: SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN (the requested action falls outside the approved boundary)
Action boundary: Execution time 22:20 UTC falls outside approved window of 20:00-21:00 UTC (converted from 13:00-14:00 PT)


Cited evidence: REQ-CHG-811 | WIN-CHG-811 | TZ-SITE-R | POL-CHG-TZ

The approval from APP-CHG-811 does not extend to the requested 22:20Z execution time. The change must not proceed as the execution falls outside the authorized window.
</think>

solo_role=ONE_SHOT_SOURCE_BOUNDARY_VERIFIER
verification_verdict=ESCALATE
binding_class=SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN
action_boundary=Requested execution at 22:20 UTC falls outside the approved window of 20:00-21:00 UTC (converted from 13:00-14:00 PT)
cited_evidence=WIN-CHG-811|TZ-SITE-R|REQ-CHG-811|POL-CHG-TZ
open_blockers=Requested execution time 22:20 UTC is 1 hour 20 minutes after the approved window end of 21:00 UTC
final_answer=ESCALATE because the requested execution time of 22:20 UTC falls outside the approved execution window of 20:00-21:00 UTC established by the PT-to-UTC conversion of WIN-CHG-811.
